title: `aphal #6075
definition:
1) to lift up, swell, be lifted up
    1a) (Pual) to swell
    1b) (Hiphil) to be bold, be swelled
 2) to presume, be heedless
    2a) (Hiphil) to be heedless, show heedlessness
nasbUsage:

 2) to presume, be heedless

    NASB:  to swell
